---
title: Engineering
subtitle: Engineering
description: |
  Engineering for Data Science & Machine Learning Engineer
categories:
  - Engineering
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 01/01/2023
---

## Optimization

### 알고리즘 & 자료구조

* 2023-01-17, [시간·공간 복잡도 분석](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-17_time_complexity.qmd)
* 2023-01-17, [Overview](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-17_data_structure_overview.qmd)
* 2023-01-18, [Array](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-18_array.qmd)
* 2023-01-18, [Linked List](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-18_linked_list.qmd)
* 2023-01-18, [Python List](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-18_python_list.qmd)
* 2023-01-19, [Stack](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-19_stack.qmd)
* 2023-01-19, [Queue](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-19_queue.qmd)
* 2023-01-26, [Deque](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-19_deque.qmd)
* 2023-01-26, [Binary Search Tree](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-20_binary_search_tree.qmd)
* 2023-01-20, [Priority Queue](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-20_priority_queue.qmd)
* 2023-01-20, [Graph](./Optimization/Data_Structure/2023-01-20_graph.qmd)

### 알고리즘 & 자료구조

* 2023-07-02, [알고리즘 개요와 복잡도 기초](./Optimization/01-algorithm-intro.qmd)
* 2023-01-17, [시간·공간 복잡도 분석](./Optimization/02-data-structure-time-complexity.qmd)
* 2023-01-17, [자료구조 Overview](./Optimization/03-data-structure-overview.qmd)
* 2023-01-18, [Array](./Optimization/04-data-structure-array.qmd)
* 2023-01-18, [Python List](./Optimization/05-data-structure-python-list.qmd)
* 2023-01-18, [Linked List](./Optimization/06-data-structure-linked-list.qmd)
* 2023-01-19, [Stack](./Optimization/07-data-structure-stack.qmd)
* 2023-01-19, [Queue](./Optimization/08-data-structure-queue.qmd)
* 2023-01-26, [Deque](./Optimization/09-data-structure-deque.qmd)
* 2023-01-20, [Binary Search Tree](./Optimization/10-data-structure-binary-search-tree.qmd)
* 2023-01-20, [Priority Queue](./Optimization/11-data-structure-priority-queue.qmd)
* 2023-01-20, [Graph](./Optimization/12-data-structure-graph.qmd)
* 2025-02-21, [정렬 알고리즘과 핵심 패러다임](./Optimization/13-sorting-algorithms.qmd)

### 수치 최적화

* 2023-07-01, [Vectorization](./Optimization/20-vectorization.qmd)
* 2026-04-05, [분산 계산 알고리즘 — Two-pass, Single-pass, Welford, 벡터화](./Optimization/21-variance-algorithms.qmd)
* 2026-04-05, [회귀 구현 방식의 계산 복잡도 — for-loop vs 행렬 연산](./Optimization/22-regression-matrix.qmd)

## Data Engineering

### Apache Airflow

* 2023-05-01, [Introduction](./Data_Engineering/airflow/01.intro.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Airflow Environment Setting](./Data_Engineering/airflow/02.env_setting.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Operator Basics](./Data_Engineering/airflow/03.operator_basic.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Python Operators](./Data_Engineering/airflow/04.python_operator.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Template Variable](./Data_Engineering/airflow/05.template_variable.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Data Share](./Data_Engineering/airflow/06.data_share.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Task Handling - Advanced](./Data_Engineering/airflow/07.task_handling.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [More Operators](./Data_Engineering/airflow/08.more_operators.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Connection & Hook](./Data_Engineering/airflow/09.connection_hook.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Sensor](./Data_Engineering/airflow/10.sensor.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [More Airflow Functions](./Data_Engineering/airflow/11.airflow_functions.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Dashboarding](./Data_Engineering/airflow/12.dashboarding.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Messenger Integration](./Data_Engineering/airflow/13.messenger.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Airflow Management](./Data_Engineering/airflow/14.airflow_management.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [DAG Monitoring](./Data_Engineering/airflow/15.dag_monitoring.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Airflow Architecture](./Data_Engineering/airflow/16.airflow_architecture.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Optimization](./Data_Engineering/airflow/17.optimization copy.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [ChatGPT Integration](./Data_Engineering/airflow/18.chatgpt.qmd)

### Apache Spark

### Apache Kafka

### Data Artchitecture

## Infrastructure

### General

* 2023-05-01, [Data Storage System](./Infra/General/data_storage_system.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Database Connection](./Infra/General/db_connection.qmd)

### Operating System

#### Linux

* 2023-05-01, [Frequently Used Linux Commands](./Infra/OS/Linux/01.linux_comands.qmd)
* 2024-01-25, [Error Fix: rm cannot remove files (busy)](./Infra/OS/Linux/rm_cannot_remove_files.qmd)

#### Shell

* 2025-05-07, [Shell 개요](./Infra/OS/Shell/1.shell-overview.qmd)
* 2023-12-05, [Shell 핵심 개념 정리](./Infra/OS/Shell/2.shell-concepts.qmd)

#### WSL2

* 2023-05-01, [Introduction & Installation](./Infra/OS/WSL/01.wsl-install.qmd)

### Cloud

#### AWS

* 2023-03-09, [Computing and Networking](./Infra/Cloud/AWS/computing_networking.qmd)
* 2023-03-12, [Storage and Database](./Infra/Cloud/AWS/storage_database.qmd)
* 2023-03-26, [Monitoring and Shared Responsibility](./Infra/Cloud/AWS/monitoring_sharedresponsibility.qmd)
* 2023-04-05, [Infrastructure Security](./Infra/Cloud/AWS/infra_security.qmd)

#### Azure

##### Azure 기초

* 2025-04-01, [Azure - DBA Introduction](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/0.azure_dba_intro.qmd)
* 2025-04-02, [Azure - Server-Based DB Management](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/1.azure_server_based_db_management.qmd)
* 2025-04-03, [Azure - Azure Enterprise Architecutre Overview](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/0-az-architecture-overview.qmd)
* 2025-04-03, [Azure - 데이터 플랫폼 리소스 계획 및 구현](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/2.IaaS.qmd)

##### Azure AI Services

* 2025-11-03, [Azure - Document Intelligence](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/20-az-document-intelligence.qmd)
* 2026-03-18, [Azure - Document Intelligence 출력 형식 활용 가이드](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/20-1-az-document-intelligence-output.qmd)
* 2025-12-16, [Azure Open AI Foundry - Deployment Type](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/21-az-ai-foundry-deployment.qmd)
* 2025-12-17, [Azure Open AI Foundry - Quota and Limit](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/22-az-ai-foundry-quota.qmd)
* 2025-12-18, [Azure Open AI Foundry - 다른 Region Resource의 Subnet Connection b/w VM and Foundry](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/23-az-regional-peering.qmd)

##### Azure AI Search

* 2025-12-19, [Azure AI Search 개요 및 구성](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/24-az-ai-search-overview.qmd)
* 2025-12-20, [Azure AI Search 지역, 계층 및 서비스 제한사항](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/25-az-ai-search-quota-limit.qmd)
* 2025-12-21, [Azure AI Search 지역 지원 및 계층 선택](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/26-az-ai-search-classic-search.qmd)
* 2025-12-22, [Azure Search — BM25(전통 검색) 개요](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/27-az-ai-search-classic-bm25.qmd)
* 2025-12-22, [Azure Search — Semantic Search 및 Hybrid Search 개요](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/28-az-ai-search-classic-semantic.qmd)
* 2025-12-23, [Azure Search — Vector Search 심층 가이드](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/29-az-ai-search-classic-vector-search.qmd)
* 2025-12-24, [Azure AI Search 서비스 제한사항](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/30-az-ai-search-classic-hybrid-search.qmd)
* 2026-12-25, [Azure AI Search Multimodal Search](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/31-az-ai-search-classic-multimodal-search.qmd)
* 2025-12-26, [Relevance and Ranking](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/32-az-ai-search-classic-ranking.qmd)
* 2026-03-06, [Azure AI Search: Agentic Retrieval & RAG](./Infra/Cloud/Azure/33-az-ai-search-agent-search.qmd)

#### Azure DevOps

* 2024-01-01, [Azure DevOps 소개](./Infra/Cloud/Azure_DevOps/1.devOps_intro.qmd)
* 2024-01-02, [Azure DevOps 브랜치 전략 가이드](./Infra/Cloud/Azure_DevOps/2.devOps_branch_strategy.qmd)
* 2023-01-03, [Azure Boards 작업 항목 작성 가이드](./Infra/Cloud/Azure_DevOps/3.azure_collabo_board.qmd)

#### GCP

### Virtualization

### On-Premise

* 2023-05-01, [GPU](./Infra/On_Presmise/2.gpu.qmd)
* 2026-03-26, [온프레미스 GPU 서버에서 Python 개발 환경 구축](./Infra/On_Presmise/3.on-premise-python-env.qmd)

### Security

* 2025-11-24, [SSH 개요와 작동 원리](./Infra/Security/01.ssh-overview.qmd)
* 2025-11-25, [SSH 키 생성과 관리](./Infra/Security/02.ssh-key-management.qmd)
* 2025-11-26, [SSH Config와 접속](./Infra/Security/03.ssh-config-connection.qmd)
* 2025-11-27, [SSH 포트 포워딩과 터널링](./Infra/Security/04.ssh-port-forwarding.qmd)
* 2025-11-28, [SSH 보안 강화](./Infra/Security/05.ssh-security.qmd)
* 2025-12-11, [VS Code Remote SSH 원격 개발](./Infra/Security/06.ssh-vscode-remote.qmd)
* 2026-03-11, [SSH로 Private Git 패키지 설치](./Infra/Security/07.ssh-private-git-package.qmd)


## DevOps

* [DevOps Concept - (정의,  역사,  철학)]()
* [DevOps Concept - Infrastructure as Code (IaC)의 개념]()
* [DevOps Concept - Continuous Integration (CI) 개념]()
* [DevOps Concept - Continuous Deployment/Delivery (CD) 개념]()
* [DevOps Concept - DevOps와 SRE(Site Reliability Engineering)의 차이]()
* 2025-11-24, [DevOps Concept - venv vs pyenv vs Poetry vs Conda 비교 분석](./DevOps/0-dev_envs.qmd)

### Project

* 2025-11-02. [Project 목표 설정](../Agent/13-Cloud-RAG/01-Project-Overview.qmd)
* 2025-11-24, [VM - 생성](./DevOps/0-vm_creation.qmd)
* 2025-11-25, [VM - 개발환경 구축](./DevOps/1-vm_dev_envs_settings.qmd)
* 2025-11-26, [VM - 가상환경 설치](./DevOps/2-vm_venv_setup.qmd)
* 2025-11-26, [VM - Poetry를 이용한 Dependency 설치](./DevOps/3-vm_dependency_setup.qmd)
* 2025-11-26, [Azure Blob Storage - Datalake 생성](./DevOps/4-blob_data_lake_setup.qmd)
* 2025-12-20, [Azure VM에서 팀 협업하기](./DevOps/5-vm_collaboration.qmd)
* 2026-03-26, [ML 모델 가중치 관리 및 배포 패턴](./DevOps/6-model_weight_management.qmd)

### VS Code

* 2023-05-01, [Introduction & Installation](./DevOps/VScode/01.vscode_install.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [VS Code Jupyter 커널 무응답 — ZMQ 소켓 충돌 진단과 해결](./DevOps/VScode/02.vscode-jupyter-kernel-zmq.qmd)
* 2026-04-10, [VS Code Jupyter 커널 연결은 됐는데 셀이 실행 안 되는 문제](./DevOps/VScode/03.vscode-jupyter-interpreter-discovery.qmd)

### Git

* 2026-03-11, [Git - 비개발자를 위한 Git 시작 가이드](./DevOps/Git/0.git_for_nondev.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Git - Introduction & Installation](./DevOps/Git/1.git_install.qmd)
* 2023-05-02, [Git - 기본 워크플로우](./DevOps/Git/2.git_basic_workflow.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Git - Branch](./DevOps/Git/3.git_branch.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Git - Branch Policy](./DevOps/Git/4.git_branch_policy.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Git - Pull Request](./DevOps/Git/5.pull_request.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Git - Graph](./DevOps/Git/6.git_graph.qmd)
* 2023-05-07, [Git - GitHub 로컬 저장소와 원격 저장소 연결 문제 해결](./DevOps/Git/7.git_remote.qmd)
* 2023-05-08, [Git - Merge vs Rebase](./DevOps/Git/8.git_merge_rebase.qmd)
* 2023-05-09, [Git - 되돌리기 완전 가이드](./DevOps/Git/9.git_undo.qmd)
* 2023-05-10, [Git - Stash](./DevOps/Git/10.git_stash.qmd)
* 2023-05-11, [Git - Tag와 릴리스 관리](./DevOps/Git/11.git_tag.qmd)
* 2023-05-12, [Git - .gitignore 심화 가이드](./DevOps/Git/12.git_gitignore.qmd)
* 2023-05-13, [Git - Cherry-pick](./DevOps/Git/13.git_cherry_pick.qmd)
* 2023-05-14, [Git - 고급 기능](./DevOps/Git/14.git_advanced.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [Git - Fork와 원격 저장소 동기화](./DevOps/Git/15.git_fork.qmd)
* 2026-04-03, [Git - 브랜치 동기화](./DevOps/Git/16.git_sync.qmd)
* 2026-04-03, [Git - 머지 충돌 해결: 개념과 전략](./DevOps/Git/17.git_merge_conflict_concepts.qmd)
* 2026-04-03, [Git - 머지 충돌 해결: 실전 케이스](./DevOps/Git/18.git_merge_conflict_cases.qmd)
* 2026-04-05, [Git - Git을 AI Agent 지식 베이스로 활용하기 — xlsx → JSON 변환](./DevOps/Git/19.git-knowledge-base-json.qmd)

### Conda

* 2023-05-01, [Conda - Introduction & Installation](./DevOps/Conda/01.conda_install.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Conda - Environment Backup](./DevOps/Conda/conda_env_backup.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Conda - Path Pollution](./DevOps/Conda/path_pollution.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Conda - Wrapper Failure](./DevOps/Conda/wrapper_failure.qmd)

### Poetry

* 2025-10-01, [Poetry - Concept](./DevOps/Poetry/01.poetry-intro.qmd)
* 2025-10-02, [Poetry - Install](./DevOps/Poetry/02.poetry-setup.qmd)
* 2025-10-03, [Poetry - Dependency 관리](./DevOps/Poetry/03.poetry-dependency.qmd)
* 2025-10-04, [Poetry - 가상환경 관리](./DevOps/Poetry/04.poetry-virtualenv.qmd)
* 2025-10-05, [Poetry - pyproject.toml 상세 가이드](./DevOps/Poetry/05.poetry-pyproject-toml.qmd)
* 2025-10-06, [Poetry - 빌드와 배포](./DevOps/Poetry/06.poetry-build-publish.qmd)
* 2025-10-07, [Poetry - 설정과 고급 명령어](./DevOps/Poetry/07.poetry-config-advanced.qmd)
* 2025-10-08, [Poetry - 도구 비교 (pip, Conda, Pipenv, PDM)](./DevOps/Poetry/08.poetry-comparison.qmd)
* 2025-10-09, [Poetry - CI/CD와 Docker 통합](./DevOps/Poetry/09.poetry-ci-cd-docker.qmd)
* 2025-10-10, [Poetry - 트러블슈팅](./DevOps/Poetry/10.poetry-troubleshooting.qmd)
* 2025-03-06, [Poetry - 프로젝트에서 외부 Git 패키지 통합](./DevOps/Poetry/11_poetry-external-repo-connection.qmd)
* 2025-03-07, [Poetry - Python 빌드 시스템과 pyproject.toml 이해](./DevOps/Poetry/12_poetry-build-system-difference.qmd)
* 2025-03-08, [Poetry - git dependency — URL, 위치, PEP 508, 실무 패턴](./DevOps/Poetry/13_poetry-git-dependency.qmd)
* 2025-03-09, [Poetry - SSH 다계정 인증과 ~/.ssh/config alias](./DevOps/Poetry/14_poetry-ssh-auth-multi-account.qmd)
* 2025-03-09, [Poetry - pyproject.toml 없는 외부 repo 패키지화 전략](./DevOps/Poetry/15_poetry-packaging-without-pyproject.qmd)
* 2025-03-10, [Poetry - local path 의존성에서 git URL로 전환하기](./DevOps/Poetry/16_poetry-local-path-to-git-url.qmd)

### Docker

* 2025-01-01, [Docker - Introduction & Installation](./DevOps/Docker/01.docker_install.qmd)
* Docker - Compose (미작성)
* Docker - Container (미작성)
* [Docker - 개념 (이미지,  컨테이너,  레지스트리)]()
* [Docker - Dockerfile 작성 (FROM,  RUN,  COPY,  CMD 등)]()
* [Docker - 이미지 빌드 및 실행]()
* [Docker - 컨테이너 라이프사이클 관리]()
* [Docker - Compose 기초 (여러 컨테이너 조율)]()
* [Docker - 레이어 최적화 및 캐싱 전략]()
* [Docker - 네트워킹 (bridge,  host,  overlay)]()
* [Docker - 볼륨 및 데이터 퍼시스턴스]()
* [Docker - Registry (Docker Hub,  Private Registry)]()
* [Docker - Multi-stage Build 패턴]()
* [Docker - Streamlit 애플리케이션 Docker화 PoC]()
* [Docker - Dockerfile에서 Poetry 통합 PoC]()
* [Docker - 포트 매핑 및 환경 변수 설정 PoC]()
* [Docker - 로컬 테스트 및 배포 검증 PoC]()

### CI/CD 파이프라인 구축

* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - Git Flow vs GitHub Flow vs Trunk-Based Development]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - Pull Request 리뷰 프로세스]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - Semantic Versioning (버전 관리)]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - GitHub Actions 기초]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - GitHub Actions: Workflow 작성 (yaml 문법)]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - GitHub Actions: 자동 테스트 트리거]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - GitHub Actions: Docker 이미지 빌드 및 푸시 자동화]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - GitLab CI/CD 기초]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - Jenkins 기초 (엔터프라이즈 환경)]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - 빌드(Build) 단계 자동화]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - 테스트(Test) 단계 자동화]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - 배포(Deploy) 단계 자동화]()
* [CI/CD 파이프라인 - 실패 처리 및 롤백 전략]()

### 클라우드 인프라 (Azure 중심)

* [Cloud - Azure Container Registry (ACR)]()
* [Cloud - Azure App Service (웹앱 배포)]()
* [Cloud - Azure Virtual Machines]()
* [Cloud - Azure Database 서비스]()
* [Cloud - Azure DevOps 파이프라인]()
* [Cloud - Release Management]()
* [Cloud - Artifact Repository]()

### 오케스트레이션 Kubernetes (운영 자동화)

* [Orchestration - Kubernetes 개념 (Pod,  Node,  Cluster,  Service)]()
* [Orchestration - Kubernetes 아키텍처]()
* [Orchestration - kubectl 기본 명령어]()
* [Orchestration - Deployment 작성 및 관리]()
* [Orchestration - Service와 Ingress 이해]()
* [Orchestration - ConfigMap & Secret (설정 관리)]()
* [Orchestration - Persistent Volume (데이터 저장)]()
* [Orchestration - StatefulSet vs Deployment]()
* [Orchestration - HorizontalPodAutoscaler (자동 스케일링)]()
* [Orchestration - 무중단 배포 (Rolling Update)]()
* [Orchestration - AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service)]()
* [Orchestration - Docker Desktop Kubernetes (로컬 학습)]()
* [Orchestration - minikube (경량 로컬 클러스터)]()

### 모니터링 & 로깅

* [App Monitoring - Prometheus 기초]()
* [App Monitoring - Grafana 대시보드 구성]()
* [App Monitoring - 메트릭 정의 및 수집]()
* [App Monitoring - 알림 설정]()
* [Log Monitoring - ELK Stack (Elasticsearch,  Logstash,  Kibana)]()
* [Log Monitoring - 중앙 집중식 로깅]()
* [Log Monitoring - 로그 분석 및 디버깅]()
* [Cloud Monitoring - Cloud Monitoring - Azure Monitor]()
* [Cloud Monitoring - Application Insights]()
* [Cloud Monitoring - Log Analytics]()

### 보안 & 운영 관리

* [DevOps 보안 - 컨테이너 보안 스캔]()
* [DevOps 보안 - 시크릿 관리 (API 키,  비밀번호)]()
* [DevOps 보안 - 접근 제어 (RBAC)]()
* [DevOps 보안 - 네트워크 보안]()

## System Architecture & Design

### Data Modeling

* 2025-01-01, [Data Modeling - Conceptual Design](./System/Archi_Design/data_modeling/1.data_modleing_conceptual_dsign.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Data Modeling - Logical Design](./System/Archi_Design/data_modeling/2.data_modleing_logical_design.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Data Modeling - Physical Design](./System/Archi_Design/data_modeling/3.data_modleing_physical_design.qmd)

### Agent Platform Design

* 2025-01-01, [Agent Platform - Overview](./System/Archi_Design/platform/1.agent_platform_overview.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Agent Platform - Design Strategy](./System/Archi_Design/platform/2.agent_platform_design_strategy.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Agent Platform - Repository Strategy](./System/Archi_Design/platform/3.agent_platform_repo_strategy.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Agent Platform - Interface Design](./System/Archi_Design/platform/4.agent_platform_interface_design.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Agent Platform - Data Standardization](./System/Archi_Design/platform/5.agent_platform_data_standardization.qmd)
* 2025-01-01, [Agent Platform - DevOps](./System/Archi_Design/platform/6.agent_platform_devops.qmd)

> **관련 참조**: Agent 시스템의 구현 코드와 LangChain/LangGraph 활용 예제는 [Agent - Cloud RAG (Azure)](../Agent/index.qmd#cloud-rag-azure) 섹션을 참고한다. RAG 파이프라인 구축 전체 과정은 [Agent](../Agent/index.qmd)에서 단계별로 다룬다.

### Cloud Architecture

* 2026-03-06, [AI Agent 기반 지능형 기술 지식 플랫폼 구축](./System/Cloud_Archi/agent-platform-planning.qmd)
* 2026-03-06, [Cloud Architecture: To Be Organized](./System/Cloud_Archi/to-be-organized.qmd)

## Python

#### 입문

* 2023-07-02, [파이썬 입문: 컴퓨터 과학부터 개발환경 설정까지](./Python/01-python-overview.qmd)
* 2023-07-02, [Python 변수와 데이터 타입](./Python/02-python-variable.qmd)
* 2023-07-01, [Python 제어 흐름문 (Control Flow Statements)](./Python/try-statement.qmd)

#### 함수와 모듈

* 2023-07-02, [함수: 코드 재사용과 구조화의 핵심](./Python/05-1-python-function.qmd)
* 2023-07-02, [모듈과 패키지: 코드를 파일과 디렉토리로 조직화하기](./Python/05-2-python-module.qmd)

#### OOP

* 2023-07-02, [상속과 합성: 클래스 관계 설계의 두 가지 축](./Python/06-1-python-oop-inheritance.qmd)
* 2023-07-02, [추상화와 추상 베이스 클래스 (ABC)](./Python/06-2-python-oop-abstraction.qmd)
* 2023-07-02, [캡슐화와 다형성: 데이터 보호와 인터페이스 일관성](./Python/06-3-python-oop-capsule-polymorh.qmd)

#### 라이브러리와 도구

* 2023-06-01, [Async Programming](./Python/async.qmd)
* 2023-06-01, [Decorator](./Python/decorator.qmd)
* 2023-06-01, [Image Processing](./Python/image_process.qmd)
* 2023-06-01, [Package Management: requirements.txt](./Python/package_management.qmd)
* 2023-06-01, [Pandas Copy](./Python/pandas_copy.qmd)
* 2023-07-01, [Pathlib Library: File System Path Management](./Python/pathlib.qmd)
* 2023-07-01, [Python with Statement](./Python/with-statment.qmd)
* 2026-02-14, [Python Logging](./Python/logger.qmd)
* 2026-02-14, [세션 개념 정리: 웹 세션부터 Streamlit session_state까지](./Python/session-concepts.qmd)
* 2026-02-14, [Streamlit, Flask/Django, React 비교](./Python/streamlit-frontend-web.qmd)
* 2026-02-14, [Streamlit Session State](./Python/streamlit-sesstion.qmd)
* 2026-04-13, [AST 파싱과 구조 변환 — 텍스트 편집 대신 트리 변환으로 코드 자동화하기](./Python/ast-structural-transformation.qmd)

## Web

* 2023-05-01, [HTTP Methods](./web/http_method.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Visitor Tracking](./web/visitor_trancking.qmd)
* 2023-05-01, [Website Monetization](./web/website_monetization.qmd)

## Documentation

### Dynamic Documentation

* 2023-01-19, [Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/)
* 2023-01-19, [xaringan[R]](https://github.com/yihui/xaringan)
* 2023-01-19, [Bookdown[R]](https://bookdown.org/yihui/bookdown/get-started.html)
* 2023-01-19, [DISTL](https://decile-team-distil.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html)
* 2023-01-26, [Sphinx[Python]](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/)

### Diagrams

* 2023-05-01, [Quarto & Diagrams](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/diagrams.html)
* 2023-05-01, [Graphiz Gallery](https://graphviz.org/gallery/)
* 2023-05-01, [Mermaid Gallery](https://mermaid.js.org/#/)
